## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      6 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 2, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _S. Teste_, Jul 7, 2026, 2/5: "It's an application that is very close to the chai application and is very good but which BUGS A LOT and ENDLESS ADS! Usually I take it upon myself and I accept but now it's no longer possible, the application that makes you leave the application suddenly for random moments, the application that doesn't even load for indefinite time anymore (for me it was more than 2 months, I couldn't have access to it anymore) So much so that I got 3 ads in a row and of course not even 3 message sent ,ads."
            2. _Wetu Ryi_, Jul 6, 2026, 2/5: "There's a problem. This app has many issues; it doesn't display any images or characters, and it sometimes doesn't work at all. I hope you can fix it."
            3. _Masaca Harumo_, Jul 19, 2026, 4/5: "i had like to give 5 stars only if it doesn't bug in my phone, it got automatically off whenever I open now.."

## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      5 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jun 1, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Hermia Ag_, Jul 19, 2026, 4/5: "Too many great options. The ads are not annoying, the break times are necessary for those with addiction to these kinda apps, and the memory of the bots are perfect even without a persona (which would be great if added in the future) best AI app for writing plot. There are some bugs like some of the answers being generated in Chinese, and the fact that none of the pictures load since I've updated my app, neither the posts, nor the profiles, nothing."
            2. _Yuri_, Jul 17, 2026, 4/5: "I think the app is very good but there are too many ads"
            3. _El Narii_, Jun 1, 2026, 4/5: "The app itself is nice, too bad there are too many ads, there's always an ad every 3 minutes, it's very tiring, but it's better than c.ai and chai."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 16, 2026 - Jun 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Jens T._, Jun 16, 2026, 1/5: "Worst AI chat app ever. There are no possibilities to Tell the app who my character is and there are nearly only male chars in the starting page. It is too expensive for the premium subscription"

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      2 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Pascua Family_, Jul 19, 2026, 5/5: "hi Sea Soul! so if you ever see this, can you please add to do anything we want? even romantic things, because that's what people do nowadays when texting in apps like this, xoxo!"
